Video.summary: Stagecoach driver Abe Williamson hunts down two outlaws who robbed his stagecoach.
Video.title: The Treasure of Elk Creek Canyon

Image.alt: The Treasure of Elk Creek Canyon
The Treasure of Elk Creek Canyon
The Treasure of Elk Creek Canyon
The Treasure of Elk Creek Canyon
The Treasure of Elk Creek Canyon
The Treasure of Elk Creek Canyon
The Treasure of Elk Creek Canyon
The Treasure of Elk Creek Canyon
The Treasure of Elk Creek Canyon

Video.summary: Ex-outlaw Belle Starr goes after the D.A. who ridiculed her illiterate husband.
Video.title: A Bullet for the D.A.

Video.summary: A reporter probes reports that a general is selling guns to Natives in exchange for their property.
Video.title: The Truth Teller

Video.summary: In Totem, Idaho, Dorsey Bilger has told one tall tale too many.
Video.title: A Sponge Full of Vinegar

Video.summary: An unarmed Navajo sets out to avenge the murder and robbery of a Native elder.
Video.title: Experiment in Fear

Video.summary: Abel Duncan is dying, and his last request is for an ordained minister to preside over his funeral.
Video.title: Abel Duncan's Dying Wish

Video.summary: A princess agrees to be treated by a medical pioneer who uses a new method: blood transfusion.
Video.title: Bloodline

Video.summary: Plagued by gold thefts, Denver bankers set up their own mint in the bank basement.
Video.title: The Private Mint of Clark, Gruber and Co.

Image.alt: The Private Mint of Clark, Gruber and Co.
The Private Mint of Clark, Gruber and Co.
The Private Mint of Clark, Gruber and Co.
The Private Mint of Clark, Gruber and Co.
The Private Mint of Clark, Gruber and Co.
The Private Mint of Clark, Gruber and Co.
The Private Mint of Clark, Gruber and Co.
The Private Mint of Clark, Gruber and Co.
The Private Mint of Clark, Gruber and Co.

Video.summary: Lawmen Pete Gabriel and Joe Phy were friends, then Kitty Bolton came along.
Video.title: Loss of Faith

Video.summary: A cowboy explores a valley allegedly haunted by monks that were massacred a century earlier.
Video.title: Phantom Procession

Video.summary: Johnny Ringo is an expert gunslinger with a mysterious past; his arrival in town brings concern.
Video.title: The Melancholy Gun

Video.summary: A retiring Arizona ranger chases one last crook.
Video.title: Measure of a Man

Video.summary: An attorney takes the case of a famed gunman who is charged with murder.
Video.title: Diamond Field Jack

Video.summary: Partners in a mule team freighting business try to win the affections of a widow.
Video.title: Graydon's Charge

Video.summary: Winfield Stratton finds gold just after selling his mining claim to a syndicate.
Video.title: Sixty-Seven Miles of Gold

Video.summary: Patrick Manogue is challenged by a gambler as he tries to bring morality to Virginia City, Nev.
Video.title: The Westside of Heaven

Video.summary: Wyatt Earp's brother Virgil masquerades as a bandit to gain access to an outlaw hide-out.
Video.title: Trial at Belle's Springs

Video.summary: A down-and-out cowboy pines after a wealthy rancher's daughter.
Video.title: See the Elephant and Hear the Owl

Image.alt: See the Elephant and Hear the Owl
See the Elephant and Hear the Owl
See the Elephant and Hear the Owl
See the Elephant and Hear the Owl
See the Elephant and Hear the Owl
See the Elephant and Hear the Owl
See the Elephant and Hear the Owl
See the Elephant and Hear the Owl
See the Elephant and Hear the Owl

Video.summary: A man who claims he can resurrect the dead poses a problem for killer Bill Groat.
Video.title: Miracle at Boot Hill

Video.summary: Officials rush to send word to a bride that an escaped criminal wants to stop her wedding.
Video.title: Fort Bowie: Urgent

Video.summary: A 15-year-old joins the Texas revolutionaries to avenge Davy Crockett's death at the Alamo.
Video.title: Davy's Friend

Video.summary: Pauline runs a saloon in Casa Grande and has shown she neither needs nor wants a husband.
Video.title: The Wooing of Perilous Pauline

Video.summary: A charlatan rainmaker sparks a range war.
Video.title: Big John and the Rainmaker

Video.summary: A lawman must choose between love and duty in the midst of a missing persons case.
Video.title: There Was Another Dalton Brother

Video.summary: A bear hunter and his daughters nurse an injured Easterner back to health.
Video.title: Peter the Hunter

Video.summary: A petty drunk transporting a new church bell to Volcano, Calif., decides to sell it off instead.
Video.title: A Bell for Volcano

Video.summary: Two newspaper editors compete for the right to publish Denver's first newspaper.
Video.title: The Race at Cherry Creek

Video.summary: A poet forges a relationship with a street waif.
Video.title: Magic Locket

Video.summary: Angered by increasing federal mining taxes, the citizens vote to secede from the U.S.
Video.title: Birthright

Video.summary: An Army officer helps a young man track down his sister, who was captured by Natives years before.
Video.title: The Lawless Have Laws

Video.summary: A crew of mine developers ingeniously races against time to make it from Arizona to San Diego.
Video.title: A City Is Born

Video.summary: Challenges are faced as a boat on wheels travels across the prairie and through Native country.
Video.title: Dry Water Sailors

Video.summary: A woman whose house is hit by a meteorite decides to sue God for damages.
Video.title: Canary Harris vs. the Almighty

Video.summary: California's ex-governor stops a war.
Video.title: The Firebrand

Video.summary: A priest claims the marriages in a town are void.
Video.title: The Day All Marriages Were Cancelled

Image.alt: The Day All Marriages Were Cancelled
The Day All Marriages Were Cancelled
The Day All Marriages Were Cancelled
The Day All Marriages Were Cancelled
The Day All Marriages Were Cancelled
The Day All Marriages Were Cancelled
The Day All Marriages Were Cancelled
The Day All Marriages Were Cancelled
The Day All Marriages Were Cancelled

Video.summary: The mayor of Deadwood comes up with a manufactured hero to lure tourists into his dying town.
Video.title: The Resurrection of Deadwood Dick

Video.summary: Ignoring his brother's warnings, young Roy Bean gets involved in a rivalry over a pretty girl.
Video.title: Sense of Justice

Video.summary: Suspicion over a farm and its female owner creates a rift between two mining partners.
Video.title: The Lady and the Sourdough

Video.summary: Calamity Jane meets Wild Bill Hickok.
Video.title: A Calamity Called Jane

Video.summary: The skeletons of two prospectors give Ed Schieffelin a clue to the location of a silver mine.
Video.title: Silver Tombstone

Video.summary: Lured by promises of gold, prospectors provide a wounded outlaw with aid and an alibi.
Video.title: The Man Who Didn't Want Gold

Image.alt: The Man Who Didn't Want Gold
The Man Who Didn't Want Gold
The Man Who Didn't Want Gold
The Man Who Didn't Want Gold
The Man Who Didn't Want Gold
The Man Who Didn't Want Gold
The Man Who Didn't Want Gold
The Man Who Didn't Want Gold
The Man Who Didn't Want Gold

Video.summary: A former cowhand shuns progress.
Video.title: A Wrangler's Last Ride

Video.summary: A woman's loyalties are tested when her lawman boyfriend must arrest her outlaw brother.
Video.title: The Day They Stole the Salamander

Image.alt: The Day They Stole the Salamander
The Day They Stole the Salamander
The Day They Stole the Salamander
The Day They Stole the Salamander
The Day They Stole the Salamander
The Day They Stole the Salamander
The Day They Stole the Salamander
The Day They Stole the Salamander
The Day They Stole the Salamander

Video.summary: A recruit and his pet mule are the only hope for a besieged cavalry patrol.
Video.title: Honor the Name Dennis Driscoll

Video.summary: A four-dollar lawsuit is brought against an insurance company by a farmer who claims he was cheated.
Video.title: The Four-Dollar Law Suit
